data.body: LANDED. Epic 86ac (unsalty-flattish-bagworm) COMPLETE: all 16 tickets (15 tasks + 1 story) implemented under held-out TDD, closed via completion-verifier, epic closed. All 16 Gerrit changes (#812-835) MERGED to main atomically (submitted stack top #835 -> MERGED). origin/main HEAD now 7681e405f (121b). 'rebar metrics' command live. Held-out TDD caught real impl bugs (ed13 lib-facade, 9a5a output-schema) AND my own oracle bugs; completion-verifier drove genuine test-strengthening (555e/2f8e/9a5a amended in place, Change-Ids preserved).
